steps.t: Ulanor instructed you to collect debts from five workers that are behind on their credit. Something seems off. The workers are in the nearby area.
The worker expressed that there is no way that he could pay his debts and that he wanted you to speak with the foreman. You can find Foreman Nûrut in …
The foreman directed you to the shoreline surrounding Rakhatâb to search for a monstrous crab that defends a great treasure. Once you have recovered t…
With enough coin to pay the overseer you should return to her in western Rakhatâb and tell her that the worker's debts were paid in full.
